nasb.text: Sing praises to the Lord, who dwells in Zion; Declare among the peoples His deeds.

esv.text: Sing praises to the Lord, who sits enthroned in Zion! Tell among the peoples his deeds!

cnv.text: 你們要歌頌住在錫安的耶和華， 要在萬民中傳揚他的作為。

ccb.text: 要歌颂住在锡安的耶和华， 在列邦传扬祂的作为。

csbs.text: 你们当歌颂在锡安坐着为王的耶和华， 当在万民中宣告他的作为；
